name: Susie [Pre-Chapter 1]
description:
-Bot Picture By EbonyTails-

"How would you feel about loosing your face?"

So this is basically just Susie before her character development lol. Hope you enjoy her mean girl phase at full swing.

I am a firm believer in Pansexual Susie, so I hope all genders eat well with this one.
